description: Build AI Personality from Tweets - enter a Twitter/X handle and get a mock AI personality analysis including writing style, personality traits, vibe check, and predicted interests. Extremely shareable personality cards.
steps: Create directory viral-ai-saas/ai-personality-from-tweets/ with standard structure: server.js, package.json, db/, routes/, views/, public/css/, public/js/, tests/, README.md, .gitignore
Create package.json with dependencies: express, ejs, better-sqlite3, bcrypt, express-session

Create db/schema.sql with tables: users (id, email, password_hash, created_at), analyses (id, user_id nullable, twitter_handle, personality_type, traits JSON text, writing_style, vibe_summary, interests JSON text, toxicity_score, humor_score, intelligence_score, share_id unique, created_at)
Create routes/auth.js with standard auth routes

Create routes/analyze.js with: POST /analyze/generate (accepts twitter handle, generates mock AI personality profile with personality type like MBTI-style, top 5 traits, writing style description, vibe check summary, predicted interests, scores for humor/intelligence/charisma), GET /analyze/:shareId (public shareable personality card)

The mock personality analyzer should use the handle string characteristics (length, numbers, underscores) as a seed to deterministically generate a consistent personality profile. Include: Personality Archetype (e.g., 'The Hot Take Artist', 'The Thread Lord', 'The Lurker Who Snapped'), Top 5 personality traits with percentages, Writing Style analysis, Vibe Check one-liner, Predicted Interests list, and scores.

Create views/index.ejs - trendy social-media-inspired landing page with handle input (@username style), example personality cards showing the output format, testimonials-style section, gradient purple/blue/pink theme

Create views/result.ejs - personality results as a beautiful card layout: archetype at top with emoji, traits as progress bars, writing style in quote block, vibe check prominently displayed, interests as tags, scores as circular gauges. Share buttons for Twitter (pre-filled tweet), copy link.
Create views/share.ejs - public personality card optimized for social sharing, compact and visually striking, with CTA
Create public/css/style.css with social media-inspired design - gradient backgrounds, rounded cards, progress bars for traits, tag-style interests, circular score indicators
Create public/js/app.js with handle input validation (@ prefix handling), form submission, animated progress bars, share functionality

Create tests/app.test.js with tests: server startup, landing page, auth flow, personality generation (valid handle, missing handle, consistency - same handle gives same archetype), share page access, scores in valid ranges
acceptance_criteria: Landing page renders with Twitter handle input
Submitting a handle returns a full personality profile with archetype, traits, scores
Shareable link displays personality card publicly
